HIS REASONS FOR NOT DOING SO DO NOT CONSTITUTE EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW WHY HE DELAYED IN SEEKING THIS RELIEF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TIM GOMES DBA TIM GOMES AND ASSOCIATES' Motion To Quash Service Of Order Of Examination Of Debtor.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - off calendar. Discovery matter per San Francisco Local Rule 10 A 3. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TIM GOMES DBA TIM GOMES AND ASSOCIATES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Defendant was served. As an attorney, he understood the need to respond. His reasons for not doing so do not constitute excusable neglect and defendant has failed to show why he delayed in seeking this relief. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
